signUp.terms_conditions1: I have reviewed and agree to the
signUp.cisgender_desc: A person whose current gender corresponds to the sex they were assigned at birth
signUp.genderfluid_desc: A person who does not identify with a fixed gender
signUp.genderqueer_desc: A person who does not follow binary gender norms
signUp.intersex/variations_in_sex_characteristi: A person born with traits, including genital anatomy, reproductive organs, hormone function, and/or chromosome patterns that may not fit the typical definition of male or female
signUp.non_binary_desc: Umbrella term for a person whose gender identity lies outside the gender binary
signUp.transgender_man_desc: A person whose gender is male and whose sex assigned at birth was female
signUp.transgender_woman_desc: A person whose gender is female and whose sex assigned at birth was male
signUp.prefer_not_to_say_desc: This is an option for people who do not wish to disclose their gender identity.
signUp.None_of_these: None of these apply to me
signUp.None_of_these_desc: This is an option for people who do not identify with any of the listed terms.
